data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. The branch switches agent-outcome-stats from read-modify-write JSON to atomic JSONL appendFile, fixing concurrent session safety. The baseDir parameter is backward-compatible (optional, defaults to process.cwd()). All 7 unit tests pass including concurrent append safety. TypeScript clean, no lint errors in changed files. Both original requirements (success rate capture + error recovery with agent switching) verified present on main. No security concerns.
